Staff of Elemental Mastery: Air  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 120
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Reclaim Energy (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40
Focus: Servant of Air
WT: 5.0 Size: LARGE
Class: MAG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Staff of Elemental Mastery: Air
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 120
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Reclaim Energy (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40
Focus: Servant of Air
WT: 5.0 Size: LARGE
Class: MAG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Blunt
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Tnexus Fyrewolf (Prexus Server)
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 04:51:11
Page Updated:Sat Jul 25th, 2020

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Magician Test of Displacement

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Sky


Uploaded December 19th, 2022 by iventheassassin
Send a correction

3 posts
The earth mastery staff does work post 50, I tried it with my dirtball, he hit for around 54 without it , and with I had him wacking things for 58's and 60's , Im not makeing this up, Thats the only reason I haven't turned in all my element of earth parts of my epic, because I want to keep makeing bad **** dirtballs:)

Iktome 55mage lanys

#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 28 2002 at 1:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I Saw Quillmane last week and i didnt know what it was for so i killed with my shaman friend and looted some cloak thingy. i didnt kknow what it was for untill i was told it was for mag epic ) oh well too bad im a warrior but i still have it and the proc it has.
Is this item really worth the effort?
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2001 at 12:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766095847
8 posts
One of the items involved in this quest is the Crown of Elemental Mastery, which drops off mobs on the Seventh Island in this Plane. Seeing that this crown is also used in the Orb of Mastery quest (more specifically, in obtaining the Element of Air), I don't think that people will use the crown for obtaining this Staff. Unless, of course, crowns are dropping commonly in the Plane of Air, which I seriously doubt. :)

Rascarcapac, level 51 Elementalist, Xev Server.

# Aug 17 2001 at 11:56 PM Rating: Decent

54 posts
go to this link below. This site is an awesome source of info for mages. good luck.

http://www.magecompendium.com/Quests/Orb_of_Mastery.htm

The item us mages get is actually a spell called summon orb. It summons an uber item that in turn, summon the most powerful pet in the game. Very nice item, ranks among the best epics out there.

RE: how do you get epic

# Jun 17 2001 at 7:54 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Magician epic is the longest epic in the game. go to Eq.castersrealm.com forms for the full details. ( this quest includes camping Quillmane a completely random spawn and camping 2 rare turn in spawns, its VERY VERY hard and is almost impossible under level 55 i've heard )

RE: how do you get epic

# Oct 19 2005 at 4:00 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361737014
226 posts
saying it is impossible below 55 is just dumb. almost everything in the epic is MQable. so if u have the money or have nice friends. u can get it MQ'd. also, alot of items are dropable and u could buy or again get from friends. and of course the old fasion way. get your guild to help.
▲ Page top
ATTN: Newbies
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2001 at 2:18 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Staffs of Elelmental Mastery are very nice items they make pet hit for up to 60 dmg. The way you use the staff is you hold it in hand cast pet put normal gear back on. This item is NOT fake it has been in game since plane of sky has been created quit complaing about the effect or dmg del Mage dont mele any way. Just use it put back in bag put normal gear on simple to do here is quest for those clowns who think its fake.

After talking to Magi Frinon, you talk to Roanis Elindar to get this. You need some Sweet Nectar, a Crown of Elemental Mastery, a Large Diamond and a Djinni's Stave.


Izian Asteralseer
Bertox

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 19 2005 at 4:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) well as the person above me said , well my hats off to u. u get the award for dumbass of the day. this quest gives u PART of the mage epic

Oh this thing is horrible. Dude its a FOCUS item. Makes your pet better. Who cares about the effect. Stop whining. You shouldnt even be meleeing by the time you can get this anyway.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 09 2001 at 3:48 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) if there was such an item it would be used in the epic
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 09 2001 at 7:57 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) And another dipsh*t rears his head. This rounds out the Elemental Mastery staff set. For those who don't have their epics yet, they can obtain these to get better pets. Earth is from fear or hate, water is from KK, don't remember where fire is from. It's the same as the other staves.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 20 2001 at 8:28 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I had all the reason in the world to beleive it was a fake item. For starters every player i knew never have seen it drop (and recently i found out why) as for the insult that was slung my way i have but one question for him still (and a request to all who post here regulary) why are you Anon? afraid that people might learn that you dont know what you're talking about? or that they might just stop reading your posts all together because of your lack of ettiqute?
RE: appology
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2001 at 3:09 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591766958315
3 posts
I wish people would follow their own advice. Proclaiming something to be "fake" does nothing, except make you look like a "know it all". It does not help the site, nor does it provide any useful information.

Saying something is fake is saying that you have proved something to not exist. Proving that something does NOT exist is infinitely more difficult than proving something does exist. To prove it is fake, you would need to kill every mob and complete every quest in the game and show that none of them produce the given item. To prove that it does exist just requires one example.

People who claim things to be fake are people who think they know every. It does absolutely nothing to help other people or help this site.

I will stop ranting now and help this site. Yes, this item exists. I have one.

- Gellan Mage of the 60th element
▲ Page top
RE: fake
QuoteReply

View User Forum
Anonymous

#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 09 2001 at 2:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Sorry to burst your bubbles, but the Elemental Staff of Fire was never put in game on a live server. It used to be on TEST on another dragon before the epics were created, it was not made live.
Fire DOES exist..now.
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2001 at 9:02 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Welp, It seems Verant decided to make me eat my words.. The Elemental Staff of Fire DOES exist, now.. the lastest patch which revamped the planes included a new drop (you figure out where :P).

Now all four staves ARE in fact ingame. Only Earth and water are needed for the Epic however.

Also, unless they changed it, the Staves DID work on post 50 pets, I used to use my water staff regullary and noticed a difference (easy to tell since a jboot like speed buff is given to the pet). That was a long time ago however, and i've since turned in the staff for the Epic, and they might have changed it.. However according to the spell database there "IS" some sort of focus item still avail for post 50 pets, perhaps they changed it, but it still looks the same from when I made my own tests.
▲ Page top
RE: Fire does NOT exist..

# Mar 09 2001 at 9:59 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Also note, a magician with the epic, would NOT ever waste time to get this. Why would a magician who can summon the "master of elements" pet want to get a focus staff that doesn't even work on post-50 pets =P.

My friend is a 54 magi and all the other magicians in his guild confirm that focus items (including the staves of elemental mastery) do not work on post-50 pet summon spells (i.e. vocarate and greater vocaration)

=P

# Sep 10 2002 at 10:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777813535
18 posts
ActuallY the Staff of Elementary : Fire does exist, we had it drop on Rodcet Nife about 2 months ago in the plane of Hate off of a Male forsaken Revnent. I Understand this to be extremmly rare and more of a "collectors items" I guess you would say. One of my guild's mages looted the staff and still has it to this day. I on the other hand passed up on looting this staff because the Magi P Tasa was up, and since his drop rates where upped, I gladly looted the Earth staff which I still use to this day when soloing. Dont say something doesnt exist if you really dont know what your talking about. I mean it only shows your pure moronicy.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 14 2002 at 6:55 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I'm just responding to make this list longer =)
Focus Item, who cares about effectr
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2001 at 9:48 PM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yeah it is the air pet focus item for 50+.
The Staves of Elemental MAstery:Air increases the level of a summoned air pet by 1 level. I believe it only works for the 49 and up pet summoning spells.

Sure it would be nice if it also had some cool effect instead of Reclaim Energy, but that's not really important. Most mages will probably whip it out to summon a pet, but leave it in the bag the rest of the time, preferring to wield some stat gear in each hand.

There are similar staves for Water, Earth, and Fire pets.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 08 2001 at 6:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WOW here it is folks the amazing reclaim energy effect. What would we mages do without this? I can tell you - maybe get something worthwhile? This is a level 1 spell as you all know and now we have 9 (count them 9) quest items that cast a level 1 spell. Isn't this great?
RE: Reclaim energy
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2001 at 10:28 PM Rating: Decent

sheesh people need to read everything before they spew off their idiotic drabble. This is an air pet focus item. repeat it with me kids. F-O-C-U-S.
